name: rarog
description: Rarog CSS Framework — современный гибридный CSS-фреймворк на базе дизайн-токенов, утилит и компонентов.
author: TheSkiF4er <dev@cajeer.ru>

scripts.build:all: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:adapters
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:adapters && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:adapters: npm run build:js && npm run build:adapters && vitest run tests/adapters
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && npm run test:adapters && npm run test:contracts
scripts.test:contracts: vitest run tests/js/component-contracts.test.js tests/js/contract-sweep.test.js tests/js/dispose-contract.test.js tests/js/event-contract.test.js tests/js/event-contract-core.test.js tests/js/event-contract-overlay-components.test.js
scripts.release:verify: npm run release:check && npm run docs:check
scripts.docs:check: npm run docs:lint && npm run docs:build && node tools/check-docs-output.mjs
scripts.test:release: npm run test:unit && npm run test:adapters && npm run test:contracts
